comment: Pinned to the FFmpeg 8.1.2 release-branch build from BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds (not the rolling master-latest tag) so the pin is stable and reproducible. GPL shared build (avformat/avcodec/avutil/swscale/swresample DLLs + import libs). Re-pin by picking a newer autobuild-YYYY-MM-DD-HH-MM release tag from https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds/releases and updating url/sha256 here.
